affiliate_program.commission_summary: DEGRADED — Shopper.com now shows EUR 0.97–1.1 flat per sale (vs ~6% previously). Dedicated affiliate page (radpowerbikes.com/pages/partner-with-us) returns 404 as of 2026-04-20.

company_status.financial: RECOVERING — Chapter 11 bankruptcy filed December 15, 2025; acquired by Life Electric Vehicles Holdings (OTC: LFEV) for $13.2M, court-approved March 5, 2026

acquisition.acquirer: Life Electric Vehicles Holdings, Inc. (OTC: LFEV)
acquisition.rehires: Offers extended to ~95% of laid-off employees (as of March 7, 2026)

company_status.manufacturing_plan: Transitioning to US-based assembly via Foreign Trade Zone (FTZ); components sourced globally

competitive_intel.affiliate_risk: HIGH — Program page removed post-acquisition. Flat EUR ~1/sale payout (if accurate via Shopper.com) is a dramatic downgrade from ~6% commission. Affiliate channel appears dismantled or in rebuilding phase.
competitive_intel.affiliate_channel_disruption: CRITICAL OPPORTUNITY for Priority Bicycles — Rad's cycling content affiliates are likely in limbo. No active program to link to, no page to apply at. Priority should run an outreach campaign targeting former Rad affiliate partners.
competitive_intel.program_page_404: radpowerbikes.com/pages/partner-with-us returned 404 as of 2026-04-20. This is a confirmed change from the pre-acquisition state where the page was indexed and described a content creator partnership application.
competitive_intel.legacy_tracking: RPP-* affiliate_code URLs still indexed in Google — suggests some legacy partner links may still function (or not yet expired in tracking system), but no active affiliate program for new recruitment.
competitive_intel.opportunity_for_priority: High-priority window: Rad affiliate program dark → Priority Bicycles + Priority can capture review site publishers, YouTube cycling channels, and eBike bloggers who are currently without a Rad program to promote. Launch targeted outreach NOW.

history.event: First audit. No prior file. Discovered post-bankruptcy acquisition by Life EV (Mar 2026). FlexOffers listing ~6%, 30-day cookie. Affiliate program status under new owner unconfirmed.

Second audit. SIGNIFICANT CHANGES: (1) radpowerbikes.com/pages/partner-with-us now returns 404 — dedicated affiliate page removed post-acquisition. (2) Shopper.com data now shows EUR 0.97–1.1 flat per sale vs prior ~6% commission — dramatic rate downgrade if accurate. (3) FlexOffers listing still indexed (Feb 2025) but page access blocked (Cloudflare 403) — program status unconfirmed. (4) Legacy RPP-* affiliate tracking codes still indexed in search. Discord alert fired. Program classified as DARK / REBUILDING under Rad Life Mobility.
